emails.subject: FW: Today's Hearing
emails.body: FW: Today's Hearing FYI To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: Today's Hearing
emails.body: RE: Today's Hearing Good news. When do we expect to get a ruling? Let me know. Thanks, Chris Hilgert Enron Compression Services Work: 713-853-7350 Cell: 713-857-2479 <URL> To: Hilgert, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Today's Hearing
emails.body: After this hearing staff makes a recommendation to the commission. The commission decision should be issued in late Oct. or early Nov. To: Nemec, Gerald
